seoTitle: Tarin Rock vs Teesdale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tarin Rock and Teesdale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tarin Rock vs Teesdale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tarin Rock and Teesdale.
heading: Tarin Rock vs Teesdale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tarin Rock, Western Australia and Teesdale, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tarin Rock has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Teesdale (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tarin Rock or Teesdale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tarin Rock has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Teesdale scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tarin Rock scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Teesdale scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tarin Rock or Teesdale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tarin Rock has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
